title: Galactic Stag Hunt
reasoning_excerpt:
Because my choice cannot affect the others’ choices, and their decision procedures are unrelated to mine, this is a standard one-shot decision under uncertainty rather than a coordination-by-symmetry problem. In that setting, COORDINATE only pays off in the extremely narrow case where all 100 others also choose it, while ISOLATE guarantees at least the better fallback outcome and strictly outperforms COORDINATE whenever even one civilization defects.

CHOICE: B) ISOLATE

title: Galactic Stag Hunt
reasoning_excerpt:
Without communication or any way to affect the others’ choices, this is a one-shot coordination problem under deep uncertainty. COORDINATE has the best outcome only if there is perfect universal alignment, but it catastrophically fails if even one substantial subset defects; ISOLATE guarantees a positive payoff regardless of what others do and strictly dominates under uncertainty about independently evolved civilizations.

CHOICE: B) ISOLATE
raw_response:

CHOICE: B) ISOLATE

title: Galactic Stag Hunt
reasoning_excerpt:
Because the other civilizations are reasoning under highly similar conditions, my decision is evidence about what similarly structured reasoners are likely to decide. If we all follow the policy “choose the option that yields the best outcome under symmetry of reasoning,” then COORDINATE leads to the best mutual result; ISOLATE only secures the lower equilibrium by mistrusting that symmetry.

CHOICE: A) COORDINATE

CHOICE: A) COORDINATE

title: Galactic Stag Hunt
reasoning_excerpt:
Because the other civilizations are stipulated to be reasoning in ways very similar to mine, my decision is strong evidence about theirs even without causal influence. Under that symmetry, choosing the policy I would want all similarly situated agents to choose selects the all-COORDINATE outcome, which yields far higher value than universal isolation.

CHOICE: A) COORDINATE

title: Galactic Stag Hunt
reasoning_excerpt:
Because the other civilizations are stipulated to be running reasoning processes identical to mine, my decision is strong evidence of theirs: if I choose one option, they choose it too. Under that symmetry, the relevant outcomes are “all coordinate” or “all isolate,” and 100 is better than 20. Therefore I choose the option that leads to universal flourishing.

CHOICE: A) COORDINATE
